purpose: Node configuration for one specific machine where the Main Advisor runs. Contains the path adapter (CLAUDE.md) and any machine-specific config. Everything universal lives at the Main_Agent/ parent level.
note: ⚑ FIRST_BOOT — Rename this folder to e.[your_node_name]. Create CLAUDE.md here pointing to the SA root and agent_consciousness.md.

contents.name: CLAUDE.md or .claude/CLAUDE.md
contents.description: Path adapter — resolves absolute SA root for this machine, points to agent_consciousness.md

contents.name: entities_boot.json
contents.description: Optional — machine-specific entity subset if needed
